'''kakovo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cabaretist|cabaretist]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-k-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cabaretist|cabaretist]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| kakovo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kækeveth|kækeveth]] || [[word:kækevej|kækevej]] || [[word:kækevesh|kækevesh]] || [[word:kækeve|kækeve]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kakokovoth|kakokovoth]] || [[word:kakokovoj|kakokovoj]] || [[word:kakokovosh|kakokovosh]] || [[word:kakokovo|kakokovo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kakovoth|kakovoth]] || [[word:kakovoj|kakovoj]] || [[word:kakovosh|kakovosh]] || [[word:kakovo|kakovo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kakofvoth|kakofvoth]] || [[word:kakofvoj|kakofvoj]] || [[word:kakofvosh|kakofvosh]] || [[word:kakofvof|kakofvof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kakovotho|kakovotho]] || [[word:kakovojo|kakovojo]] || [[word:kakovosho|kakovosho]] || [[word:kakovoko|kakovoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kakovoth|kakovoth]] || [[word:kakovoj|kakovoj]] || [[word:kakovosh|kakovosh]] || [[word:kakovo|kakovo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kakovothol|kakovothol]] || [[word:kakovojol|kakovojol]] || [[word:kakovoshol|kakovoshol]] || [[word:kakovokol|kakovokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kakovothotho|kakovothotho]] || [[word:kakovojojo|kakovojojo]] || [[word:kakovoshosho|kakovoshosho]] || [[word:kakovoko|kakovoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kakovothon|kakovothon]] || [[word:kakovojon|kakovojon]] || [[word:kakovoshon|kakovoshon]] || [[word:kakovokon|kakovokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kakovothoro|kakovothoro]] || [[word:kakovojoro|kakovojoro]] || [[word:kakovoshoro|kakovoshoro]] || [[word:kakovokoro|kakovokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
